fields.name: prompt
fields.label: Prompt
fields.description: Exercise description shown above the editor.

fields.name: starterCode
fields.label: Starter code
fields.description: Initial Python code shown in the editor.

fields.name: testCode
fields.label: Test assertions
fields.description: Python assert statements run when the student clicks Run. Leave empty for free-form exercises (completion-only, no score).

fields.name: solutionCode
fields.label: Solution code
fields.description: Shown when the student requests the solution. Only available if 'Enable solution button' is checked.

fields.name: enableSolutionsButton
fields.label: Enable "Show solution" button
fields.description: Allow students to view the solution after attempting the exercise. Disable for exam/assessment use.

fields.name: enableRetry
fields.label: Enable "Retry" button
fields.description: Allow students to reset the editor and start over.
